payload.last_assistant_message:
There is nothing to commit. All relevant files are either gitignored or runtime artifacts:

- `specs/` — gitignored (`/specs/`)
- `.claude/` — gitignored (`.claude/`)
- `.logs/` — gitignored (`**/logs/`)
- `.ports.env` — gitignored (`.env*`)
- `adws/` — agentic harness scripts, not part of the app deliverable

No feature implementation changes exist on this branch yet. The planning phase outputs (spec file) are intentionally excluded from git. Once the feature code is implemented (hiding Free Trial CTAs in the actual source files), those changes can be committed.
